summary: The rails AI agents use to find and pay you Discussion | Link
content: Most "AI visibility" tools stop at telling you if AI mentions your brand. Bluerails goes further. We make you discoverable to AI agents and ready to get paid by them, on the rails we already run for marketplaces. What stands out: • Discovery: a peer-reviewed AI-visibility score from 400 samples, not a one-off guess. Free, no signup. • Agent-ready checkout + global settlement • Compliance built in Try your free Discovery report today; agent payments roll out next.
chineseSummary: AI 代理用来寻找您并向您付款的 Rails关联
chineseContent: 大多数“人工智能可见性”工具只是告诉你人工智能是否提到了你的品牌。 Bluerails 走得更远。在我们已经为市场运行的轨道上，我们让人工智能代理可以发现您，并准备好接受他们的报酬。突出之处： • 发现：根据 400 个样本得出的经过同行评审的人工智能可见性得分，而不是一次性猜测。免费，无需注册。 • 代理就绪结账 + 全球结算 • 内置合规性 立即尝试免费的 Discovery 报告；接下来将推出代理付款。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
